title: Provider
description: A Provider is a named external platform that backs Constructs — AWS, GCP, Auth0, Stripe, etc.

name.description: The kebab-case name of the provider, used as a reference key.

type.description: The platform type of this provider.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this provider supplies.

region.description: The primary deployment region for cloud providers.

config.description: Provider-specific configuration (account IDs, project names, etc.).
